'''DynaCorp''' was a corporation headquartered on [[Esseles/Legends|Esseles]]. They were contracted by the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]] to provide [[Hull/Legends|hull]] pods for [[Probe droid/Legends|probed droids]].<ref name="GNN6" />

DynaCorp operated a [[Refinery/Legends|refinery]] and [[Fuel/Legends|fuel]] depot on the polar island of [[Grande Hyet]]. It was attacked by the [[Terrorist/Legends|terrorist]] group known as the [[Faceless]].<ref name="GNN9" />

{{Company-stub}}
